title: bidens holstii
intro: Bidens holstii, also known as Holst's beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bidens holstii include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. Bidens holstii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal remedies.
